title: hymenasplenium × doanyense
intro: Hymenasplenium × doanyense is a hybrid fern plant, specifically a cross between Hymenophyllum millefolium and Hymenophyllum tunbridgense. It is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hymenasplenium × doanyense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant properties. This plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully explore its medicinal applications.
